Undying Sun, Kiss of Repose, Blue-Ringed Toxin, Aberrant Devour, Manikin of Oblivion

55b3331a-9662-3c31-8e8a-f9a2d0b2c939#P#nQpQs
Thinking you win with helot gmurphy team
Aigis come back
You use sorel kath ramona
And a tank to regen arithmetica
oh i don't have sorel
womp womp
We can try some friendly battle

Traphase- Battle Replay

OldDish（101197451）
A Mouse's Wisdom, Leigh, Doresain, Ramona, Ogier
Tiny Wish, Critical Point, Kiss of Repose, Rewinding Time, Duty's Gravitas
---------------VS----------------
Abyss（101022385）
The Unfading Sun, Celeste, Pandia, Ogier, Sorel
Tavern's Opening, Million Loving Gaze, Heart of Silver, Treasured Rarity, Vitality

bbda3487-449a-3b76-8662-4ec74b3a88df#P#nRLeR
this is so stupid.. i used my alt account and met a player whose elo was above 2k but how they play is.. ahh
but who would I even sub for sorel
Doresain
Sorel is mainly there for big dmg on 1 unit with weakness vulnerable debuff
Doresain can big dmg and barrier so it counter other kath ramona comp
I don't have him either
honestly this season seems a lot more diverse so far....
im not liking it lol
Im having fun so far, Ive got a silly Lily team that can pull off some bullshit
<@896400240192675850> this is the true 24 clown emote spammer dude

Traphase-All Pick Mode Battle Replay

KaDe（100999306）
Tavern's Opening, Aigis, "24", Tinct, Celeste
Miracle's Dawn, Greed, Fin of Sorrow, Deep Sea's Call, Pale Descendant
---------------VS----------------
练习生（100408297）
Cruel Homage, Pickman, Murphy: Fauxborn, Hameln, Winkle
A Mouse's Wisdom, Song of the Bound, Blue-Ringed Toxin, Memory Syndrome, Uteri Somnia

cd16f4e8-3517-307a-bc78-35b1700f915b#P#nQpQs
what a loser

Any thoughts on ways to improve this team friends? Im thinking it might be a good idea to swap out the Bone chilling embrace posse for Ogiers fortress posse to ensure Lily stays alive long enough for the Slumber Beneath the Glacier wheel to proc.
Use those if you have
You place lily front
Then when she is low you taunt on someone else
Makes sense :3 Thanks for the info
You use the posse or celeste taunt to switch their target
You don't use pandia
She is good with amplification but too hard to pilot
You need 2 strike + 2 or 3 turns + steal alienus on lily to exalt
And lily's exalt is good for tempo with stun
You just brick lily
Maybe use aurita
Once lily cleave some enemies will be low hp
Aurita finish them off with x2 the dmg form exalt because of blighten
Or use cleanse
Tinct for 3 cost cleanse
And she can server as a 2nd dps with her pierce strike
It's one of the reason my tinct had like 300 dmg just from previous screenshot
Your team get easily countered by para
Isnt Pandia fairly important to get charge on lily though 🤔
Oh I guess the posse replaces that
Makes sense
Btw be careful with arithmetica
You might lack arithmetica if they para you and you have to cleanse
your lily comp basically dead if they bring tulu and let them para twice in a row
your strike card gone
Yeah
you either need to top deck the 5 cost strike card next turn and cleanse also
if using tinct that's a whooping 8 cost not really plausible unless late game
Yeah, with the original iteration I had the discard posse to fish for it back, but with these posses Id lose that
you want nobleman instead on celeste
Idk if celeste can regen enough alienus by the time he need to cleanse
the point is that you have an out
and show your opponent that
Wait i have an idea
Aurita
With 24
But 24 nobleman staff
I run mouchette-celeste-faros-lily
still works even vs kath comp
coz they just oneshot mouchette thinking she's the crux of the team lol
intentionally hitting lily to be under 100 hp
then one shot mouchette
not knowing that's ok with me
this team sucks real bad against rng karen
get voided get voided
get entwined
I'm so mad
Always perfect rng
Meanwhile when i use karen on both all pick and draft
what are the chances you get voided two times in a row
I never get good debuff, mainly blighten and all the buffs are delayed alienus and heal
I got void 4 turns in a row
and when two other died your mouchette with treasure get entwined two times in a row with void?
so you cant even cleanse
By 1st debuff karen
fuk karen man
<:Clown:1400771541423226971> cancerous unit
Only benefiting the opponent
when I debuff they got bleed twice instead
I got blighten... 3 times in a row
When they are stuff like doresain last standing
Who heal 0
oh and lily team also weak against 24 with deep sea call lol
all those buffs is guaranteed to be gone unless you stun her before you buff posse
And those brain dead perfect rng doll reunion turn 1
That dupe cleanse 2 times
ah yeah I had an opponent
with 3 dispels
so my taunt gone
my lily buff gone
my mouchette aliemus delay and enhance also gone
fantastic
So much skill
To rng reunion + cleanse turn 1
running faros leads to funny moment
Dupe draw card?
get another salvador posse
lol
put one in mouchette too
holy nuke
her 3 cost after 6 strikes card hits like a truck
with 5 charges
Mouchette 3 card strike buffed remain if the strike is played previous turn?
no
that turn only
I guess you used alva then
anyway run faros it's a good way to liven up your game
I got a few clutches getting void posse from her
disabling opponent tinct dispel
or ramona from spamming bullet twice
it feels so good getting hameln posse on opponent aurita when you see they're so ready to nuke next turn
+6 amp from dore wheel and pandia
get her gland from highest cost prepare posse
then negated by stagnate lol
Hi Feyn!
Nice to see you're still around
I'm mostly in this channel
also hi
Also just fyi I'm not a he
nw
Well, overall, just be careful, right now i doubt para comp will be there a lot because of kath ramona
But there are comp with cleanse RNG build
Im seeing a lot of Kath and a lot of Alva/Mouchette atm yeah
Yeap, already got bsed by casiah once
Alva mouchette are kind of a joke so you can win against them easily if you do the strat i did or use your lily one shot
However kath is a bit hard because they can just rng their cards and nuke your lily
The X card i mean
Yeap, been fine in that matchup so far
With arithmetica combo
Mmhm
They can literally just go arithmetica combo into 100 dmg nuke turn 1 and then strike 2 times
It's that brain dead
Im having fun with the comp though! This season feels much less oppressive than the last one
The last one felt like a chore, this time around im continuing to play despite minimal incentive to
It was cancerous af tbf
Hameln gmurphy combo nuke turn 3 without any ways to fight back properly
Yeah...
This person tried to do it again
When he failed he spammed 24 clown emote on me
Aigis weakness + agrippa wheel is just that op
He didn't even properly setup the team too
He needed magic hat
is the meta still otk slop?
Kinda yes and no
oh!
Kath one shot 1 unit turn 2
Or my comp
With tinct pierce one shot 2 units
Then nuke front
+ stun last remaining alive
Look at the replay
It's quite fun
Wait

Traphase-All Pick Mode Battle Replay

KaDe（100999306）
Tavern's Opening, Aigis, "24", Tinct, Celeste
Miracle's Dawn, Greed, Fin of Sorrow, Deep Sea's Call, Pale Descendant
---------------VS----------------
练习生（100408297）
Cruel Homage, Pickman, Murphy: Fauxborn, Hameln, Winkle
A Mouse's Wisdom, Song of the Bound, Blue-Ringed Toxin, Memory Syndrome, Uteri Somnia

cd16f4e8-3517-307a-bc78-35b1700f915b#P#nQpQs
It was this one
It's funnier
I’ll watch at home
I forget how to watch replays, it just errors out for me
Have you tried login back into the game?
yeah, either replays arent working rn or im not lol
Can I counter Kath Ramona by having a high HP brick in my back line get shot instead of someone I care about
Or do they usually have the ability to ping you a little turn one
It’s a Falter setup, right?
Either falter setup or equip wheel then nuke next turn
It's just that braindead
they can definitely ping a higher HP unit
if they draw god hand they will combo turn 2 so you need to toss higher hp characters on your turn to soak for your dps just in case
Alva is generally on the team and pings it
You can run the fortress posse to possibly help but I just run a rez on team
barriers can help too but they usually ping them off
this is probably the worst part of kath counter
since when you rez, they get all the aliemus from the big dmg when they die XD
it'd be nice if they were rez'd at 0
it'd be miserable if they were rezd at 0 in legitimately every other instance
yeah that big one shot usually jumps them to around 80 ali
going second yeah I can easily see someone doing it t1
dont play the team myself so I don't know exactly how likely it is to get every piece that soon
knowing my luck itd be never for me and always for my opp
Yeah
See that luck?
yeah they made memento broken with the recent change to it
For me it would be turn 4 for like 6 games in a row
If i ever had the units for it
Its funny they nerfed tavern twice but left memento as is
